Player Module¶

Player module.

Define the Player class, which represents the main controllable character in the game.

class model.entities.characters.player.Player(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Character

Represent the player-controlled character.

Extend Character with player-specific attributes and behavior, such as combat state and increased base health.

__EXPECTED_PARAMETERS: dict[str, type] = {}¶

Expected parameters for Player initialization.

__ID_PREFIX: str = 'P'¶

Unique prefix for player entities.

__WANTED_FIELDS: list[str] = []¶

Required fields in Entity subclasses.

_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
_max_health = 100¶

Player maximum health.

RPG Game
